title: Make 'Add Comment' button interactive

requirements.text: Make the 'Add Comment' button in CommentHistorySection functional: clicking it should open an input form (inline or modal) allowing the user to type a comment, select a PTP status, and submit the new comment so it appears in the comment timeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the 'Add Comment' button reveals a comment input form (text area + PTP status selector).
The user can type a comment and select a PTP status from the available options (ptp_made, ptp_honored, ptp_broken, not_reached, disputed).
Submitting the form appends the new comment to the displayed comment timeline for the current case.
The new comment is color-coded according to the selected PTP status, consistent with the existing color-coding scheme.
The input form can be dismissed/cancelled without submitting.
The 'Add Comment' button is disabled or shows a loading state while submission is in progress.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
New comments must follow the existing Comment type and color-coding conventions defined in frontend/src/data/dummyComments.ts and CommentHistorySection.tsx.
nonGoals: Persisting new comments to the backend (use local/dummy state unless backend integration is explicitly requested).
Changing the existing color legend or color-coding logic.
